channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-65475 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Modula Image Gallery plugin 2.14.25-2.14.30 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WP Chill Modula Image Gallery allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Modula Image Gallery: from 2.14.25 through 2.14.30.

item.title: CVE-2026-61945 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress WooCommerce Product Stock Alert plugin <= 3.0.6 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere vulnerability in MultiVendorX WooCommerce Product Stock Alert allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. This issue affects WooCommerce Product Stock Alert: from n/a through 3.0…

item.title: CVE-2026-57626 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress MailPoet plugin 5.30.0-5.33.0 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in MailPoet allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects MailPoet: from 5.30.0 through 5.33.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-65550 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Tabs plugin <= 2.5 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Shop Manager Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Tabs <= 2.5 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65540 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Popup for CF7 with Sweet Alert plugin <= 1.6.5 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Popup for CF7 with Sweet Alert <= 1.6.5 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65539 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Kwayy HTML Sitemap plugin <= 4.0 - CSRF to Stored XSS vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Kwayy HTML Sitemap <= 4.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65538 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Machete plugin <= 5.2 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Author Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Machete <= 5.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65537 · 4.3 MEDIUM — WordPress Cyr to Lat reloaded – transliteration of links and file names plugin <= 1.3.3 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Broken Access Control in Cyr to Lat reloaded – transliteration of links and file names <= 1.3.3 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65536 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress افزونه حمل و نقل ووکامرس (پست پیشتاز و سفارشی، پیک موتوری) plugin <= 4.4.5 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in افزونه حمل و نقل ووکامرس (پست پیشتاز و سفارشی، پیک موتوری) <= 4.4.5 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65535 · 4.3 MEDIUM — WordPress TinyMCE Templates plugin <= 4.8.1 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Sensitive Data Exposure in TinyMCE Templates <= 4.8.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65534 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Custom links in Elementor Image Carousel plugin <= 1.1.1 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Author Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Custom links in Elementor Image Carousel <= 1.1.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65533 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Smart SEO Tool plugin <= 4.1.2 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Smart SEO Tool <= 4.1.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65532 · 7.6 HIGH — WordPress Persian Woocommerce SMS plugin <= 7.2.2 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Shop manager SQL Injection in Persian Woocommerce SMS <= 7.2.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65531 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Qubely plugin <= 1.8.14 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Qubely <= 1.8.14 versions.
